title: Conventional IHC for the Integrated Single Cell Atlas of Endothelial Cells of the Human Lung
author: Jonas Christian Schupp
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2020.10.21.347914v1 

 Aperio ScanScope slide scanner files 

 Conventional immunohistochemical stains of endothelial markers: ACKR1, CA4, CD31, CLDN5, COL15A1, GJA5, LYVE1, PDPN, PRX, VWA1. HPGD 

 In situ RNA hybridization stains: SOSTDC1, FCN3
